source.name: United Nations Member States list joined to static capital-coordinate snapshot
source.licenseUsageNote: Static bundled data uses the official United Nations Member States list for exact-193 inclusion semantics, joined to pre-existing static capital coordinates; no runtime fetch.

inclusionRule: UN-member-states-only: exactly the 193 current United Nations Member States; territories, observer states, dependencies, and non-member states are excluded. One primary/listed capital marker per included member state.
